callSetups.rationale: Earnings beat momentum continuation. VWAP ustunde (47.8), volume confirmation. APOG 42.48 previous close uzerinde gap-up +16% ile guclu momentum. Gap-fill riski var ama VWAP hold ederse call bias.
Clean energy sector momentum, fuel cell order catalyst. RVOL > 3x. VWAP ustunde (22.9). Volume break 13M+ ile momentum continuation.
Biotech momentum, VWAP ustunde (65.0). Pipeline rebound +11% volume tailwind. No earnings today = 0DTE riski dusuk.
Index stability, VWAP ustunde (732.45). Gap-down fill 726.86 low sonrasi recovery. Michigan sentiment 49.5 better than expected. Risk-on hafif.
Tech dip-buy setup, VWAP ustunde (710.06). Semi weakness (ON, WDC) baskisi altinda ama index genelinde tutunma. 702.81 low = structural support.

putSetups.rationale: Earnings breakdown, VWAP altinda (97.3). AI demand slowdown guidance cut ile -24% gap-down. Momentum continuation short. Gap-fill reject = put bias.
Storage/memory weakness, VWAP altinda (610.5). NAND pricing pressure + cloud capex cuts. Gap-down continuation below 600 psikolojik seviye.
Semi cycle downturn put play. VWAP altinda (164.7). Foundry materials demand slowing. Below 160 = continuation zone.
Auto supplier weakness, VWAP altinda (100.25). EV demand slowdown hitting cockpit electronics. Below 100 = momentum continuation.
Probe card / semi test capex cut. VWAP altinda (136.4). Gap-down rejection pattern. 132.52 low = next support break.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 18.85 (-0.21%), normal regime (15-20). Piyasa complacent degil ama fear yok. 0DTE opsiyonlar icin normal volatilite.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech karisik: semi weakness (ON, WDC, ENTG, FORM) vs software/green energy guclu (FCEL, APOG). Auto supplier (VC) baskili. Biotech (MRNA, SLS, ACAD) momentum var.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: APOG earnings beat sonrasi +16% momentum. Cineverse (CNVS) beat. Beyond Air (XAIR) AMC bekliyor. IV crush riski APOG ve CNVS icin aktif — 0DTE YASAK.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Michigan Consumer Sentiment Final 49.5 (beklenti 48.9) hafif pozitif. FOMC/CPI yok bu hafta. Geopolitical risk dusuk. PCE takip eden haftalarda onemli.
